hero.headline: Accept direct bookings for your B&B without high commissions
hero.subheadline: DirectBnB helps Bed & Breakfast owners manage bookings and receive direct reservations from guests — completely commission-free.

problem.headline: You're losing hundreds of euros every month to commissions
problem.subheadline: Booking.com and Airbnb charge 15–25% commission on every reservation. That's money you earn — but they receive.
problem.card1Desc: At an average nightly rate of €120, you pay €18–30 per booking in commission. That can add up to €8,000 per year.
problem.card2Desc: Guests book through the platform. You have no direct connection with your guests and are fully dependent on third parties.
problem.card3Desc: Your visibility depends on algorithms. Platform changes can have immediate consequences for your occupancy rate.
problem.callout: On average, B&B owners pay €3,000 – €8,000 per year in commissions to large platforms.

solution.headline: Your own booking system, fully in your control
solution.subheadline: DirectBnB gives you a professional booking page and a powerful dashboard — so guests can book directly with you.
solution.card1Desc: Keep 100% of your booking revenue. No surprises, no hidden costs.
solution.card2Desc: Every B&B gets a personal booking page you can share via social media, your website, or a QR code.
solution.card3Desc: Manage all your bookings, rooms and guests from one clear overview dashboard.
solution.card4Desc: Guests automatically receive a confirmation email in their own language. So do you.

howItWorks.headline: Live with direct bookings in 3 steps
howItWorks.subheadline: No technical knowledge required. You're online in less than 30 minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your B&B details, add photos and describe your rooms. Simple and fast.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Set room prices, block dates and manage availability via an intuitive calendar.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Guests find your booking page, choose a room and send a reservation request. You confirm with one click.

features.headline: Everything you need to accept direct bookings
features.subheadline: A complete platform, purpose-built for Bed & Breakfast owners.
features.feat1Desc: Overview of all reservations, revenue and availability in one place.
features.feat2Desc: Visual calendar for managing availability per room.
features.feat3Desc: Save guest details and communication history for returning guests.
features.feat4Desc: Personal page you can share via a direct link or QR code.
features.feat5Desc: Confirmation and reminder emails are automatically sent in the guest's language.
features.feat6Desc: The booking page works in Dutch and English. More languages coming soon.

beta.headline: We're inviting the first 50 B&B owners
beta.subheadline: Test the platform for free and help us improve it. Beta testers receive a lifetime discount on their subscription.

form.headline: Apply for the beta
form.subheadline: Fill in your details and we'll get in touch as soon as a spot is available.
form.successMessage: Thank you for applying. We'll be in touch as soon as possible.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us at hello@directbnb.nl.
form.privacy: Your details will never be shared with third parties.

socialProof.headline: What B&B owners are saying
socialProof.comingSoon: Beta testers share their experience — coming soon.

footer.tagline: Direct bookings for Bed & Breakfasts. No commission, full control.
